natural_expression: Every morning at 7:30, after being woken up by Mochi stepping on her, Lin Xiao immediately cleans the litter box and refills the automatic feeder with Orijen dry food.
Every evening at 20:00 upon returning home from work, Lin Xiao plays with Mochi for 20 minutes using an electric fishing rod toy with feathers, then feeds it Leonardo canned food.
Every Saturday morning, Lin Xiao thoroughly vacuums the rental apartment in Future Sci-Tech City, Yuhang District, to remove cat hair and washes Mochi's cat bed.
Every other weekend, Lin Xiao bathes Mochi at home using imported pet shampoo and carefully grooms its silver shaded fur.
At the end of each quarter, Lin Xiao takes Mochi to the pet store for professional degreasing treatment and nail filing to maintain its skin health.
On weekends during their free time, Lin Xiao often meets up with her colleague Chen Chen, bringing Mochi and the Golden Retriever to gather at a pet-friendly park in Hangzhou.
Annually, Lin Xiao takes Mochi to An'an Pet Clinic near Zhuantang for a comprehensive check-up and vaccinations with Dr. Zhang.
When feeling lonely during late-night overtime work, Mochi jumps beside the keyboard to nuzzle Lin Xiao's hand, keeping her company through her work nights in Hangzhou.
During every video call with her mother, Lin's mom always asks about Mochi's well-being and mentions that she has just mailed some homemade chicken jerky treats.
Upon receiving a silent money transfer from her father with the note 'Buy heating for the cat,' Lin Xiao knows this is her taciturn father's quiet way of showing care for Mochi.
Every winter, Lin Xiao recalls that cold night in 2021 when she found and adopted a shivering little Mochi in a cardboard box downstairs from her office.

Since Mochi accidentally ingested a plastic string in 2023, Lin Xiao has developed a habit of strictly storing away all small household items before leaving home every day to prevent another accident.
When stressed from her work as a UI/UX designer, Lin Xiao returns home without saying a word, picks up Mochi, and curls up on the sofa; the cat's purring dissipates her anxiety within 10 minutes.

When feeling lonely while working late at night in her rental apartment in Yuhang District, Hangzhou, Mochi voluntarily jumps beside the monitor and rubs its head against Lin Xiao's hand, making her feel she is not fighting alone.

Upon hearing the sound of a 'Xiao Li Zi' can being opened, Mochi, who is usually aloof and tsundere even in sleep, instantly wakes up and dashes over; this contrast brings Lin Xiao the joy of feeling needed.
When Mochi lies on the keyboard again to 'supervise' Lin Xiao as she works on her design drafts, she feels helplessly unable to type, yet warmed and amused by the cat's intense possessiveness.

Upon receiving homemade chicken jerky mailed by her mother and hearing her ask about Mochi during their video call, Lin Xiao feels the warm shift in her mother's attitude from opposition to acceptance.
Seeing the transfer note from her father reading 'for buying a heater for the cat,' Lin Xiao understands her taciturn father's clumsy yet profound love for Mochi, filling her heart with emotion.

Whenever Lin Xiao spots small objects on the floor, she instantly becomes tense and puts them away immediately; the harrowing memory of Mochi swallowing a plastic string and suffering an intestinal obstruction in 2023 keeps her from letting her guard down.

While exchanging photos of Mochi and a Golden Retriever with her best friend Chen Chen at a pet-friendly park on the weekend, Lin Xiao finds strong resonance and relaxation in sharing the little moments of pet ownership.
Seeing Dr. Zhang patiently treat Mochi at An'an Pet Clinic, Lin Xiao felt reassured and grounded to have a professional veterinarian who feels like a trustworthy friend.

Looking at Mochi, now a healthy and affectionate silver-shaded cat, Lin Xiao often feels grateful for the decision made on that overtime night in the winter of 2021, rejoicing that she gave this little life a home.

When moving into her new home in Future Sci-Tech City, seeing Mochi safely basking in the sun on the enclosed balcony, Lin Xiao felt comforted by her earlier decision to prioritize 'pet-friendly' housing.
After deep vacuuming every Saturday, looking at the clean room and Mochi, whose fur is now fluffy and smooth from grooming, Lin Xiao finds healing and a sense of order in her labor.

Every day before leaving for her company in Future Sci-Tech City, Yuhang District, Lin Xiao makes a point to check that the balcony latch is securely closed and softly tells Mochi, 'Be good and watch the house,' a safety habit formed since the accident in 2023.

When Lin Xiao sees Mochi, the silver-shaded cat, curled up like a 'mochi ball' sleeping in the sunlight, she immediately pulls out her phone to take a photo, saving it as 'today's dose of cuteness' to send to her mother or Chen Chen later.
While preparing dinner, Lin Xiao calls out in her uniquely gentle tone, 'Mochi, dinner time!' Upon hearing this, the aloof cat instantly dashes from any corner of the room to her feet.

Whenever Lin Xiao opens her computer to start drafting UI designs, Mochi always jumps precisely onto the keyboard area and lies down. Lin Xiao then habitually operates the mouse with her left hand while gently stroking the cat's back with her right, continuing her work.

Every time she opens a package of 'Partners' raw freeze-dried food or 'Leonardo' canned food, Lin Xiao immediately seals the packaging and locks it in a high cabinet to prevent a recurrence of the tragedy where plastic wrapping was accidentally eaten.

Every night at 20:00, the moment Lin Xiao pushes open the door to her rental apartment, she first puts down her bag and crouches down, waiting for Mochi to come over and rub against her legs to sniff her scent. Only after completing this fixed 'homecoming ritual' does she proceed to change her shoes.

Noticing that Mochi had lost interest in the expensive electric mouse, Lin Xiao makes it a weekly habit to rotate the placement of the corrugated cardboard scratcher and the feather fishing rod toy to rekindle the British Shorthair's hunting instincts.

During daily grooming, Lin Xiao carefully parts the Silver Shaded cat's thick undercoat to inspect the skin, only continuing with the brushing once confirmed that there are no red patches similar to the ringworm from years past.

When meeting Chen Chen at the pet park on weekends, Lin Xiao habitually lets Mochi and the Golden Retriever sniff each other first, then immediately raises their phone to capture the interaction between the two pets for posting on WeChat Moments.

Whenever feeling anxious about design project deadlines, Lin Xiao subconsciously buries their face in Mochi's soft belly and takes a deep breath, using the cat's unique scent and body warmth to quickly calm down.

After every check-up at An'an Pet Hospital, Lin Xiao habitually takes out a notebook to meticulously record every recommendation Dr. Zhang makes regarding Mochi's weight and dental care, ensuring they can be implemented at home.

Before bed, Lin Xiao checks the remaining food and water levels in the automatic feeder, and ensures Mochi's cat bed is placed in a quiet corner away from the window, guaranteeing a peaceful night's sleep in Hangzhou.

Given that Mochi suffered an intestinal obstruction in 2023 due to ingesting a foreign object, Lin Xiao is exceptionally cautious when selecting 'Orijen' dry food. She strictly follows Dr. Zhang's 'small, frequent meals' recommendation from An'an Pet Clinic, using the automatic feeder to precisely control portion sizes and prevent digestive strain.

Recalling Mochi's severe history of ringworm during the early adoption period, Lin Xiao parts the silver-shaded undercoat to carefully inspect the skin every Saturday after bathing with imported shampoo. Only after confirming there are no red patches does she return the washed cat bed to the enclosed balcony for sun disinfection.

When revisions to the UI design drafts cause Lin Xiao anxiety, Mochi's act of lying on the keyboard to 'supervise' not only interrupts her negative thoughts but also reminds her of their meeting on that cold night in 2021. Consequently, stroking the cat's back quickly calms her, allowing her to refocus on work.

Lin's mother has transformed from initially opposing cat ownership to regularly mailing homemade chicken jerky. This change stems from Lin Xiao consistently sending cute videos of Mochi in their Yuhang rental apartment; particularly after the ingestion crisis, Lin Xiao's demonstrated sense of responsibility completely alleviated her mother's hygiene concerns.

Before meeting Chen Chen at the pet-friendly park in Hangzhou, Lin Xiao always checks Mochi's nail length. This habit stems from a 2023 intestinal obstruction incident, which made her realize that outdoor environments are complex; she must ensure her beloved pet won't accidentally ingest foreign objects or get injured while playing socially.

After noticing Mochi's lack of interest in the expensive electric mouse, Lin Xiao leveraged its British Shorthair hunting instincts to purchase corrugated cardboard scratchers and feather fishing rod toys. By rotating these items every Saturday after a deep vacuuming session, she successfully rekindled the vitality of this kitten, which had previously suffered from ringworm.

Lin Xiao's decision in 2022 to prioritize apartments with enclosed balconies during her move proved especially wise after Mochi recovered from accidentally ingesting a plastic string. Nowadays, she double-checks the balcony latches before leaving home every day, ensuring absolute safety for this Silver Shaded cat that loves lounging by the window in their high-rise building in Hangzhou.

Inspired by Dr. Zhang's patient guidance during Mochi's ringworm treatment, Lin Xiao not only takes the cat to An'an Pet Hospital every quarter for professional degreasing but has also developed the habit of recording medical instructions. She even shared this professional care knowledge with her best friend Chen Chen, who is also a pet owner.

The clumsy yet loving care shown by her father, who transferred money with the note 'Buy a heater for the cat,' made Lin Xiao feel incredibly warm while setting up a cozy cat bed for Mochi during the cold winter. She immediately took a photo of Mochi sleeping soundly next to the heater and sent it to her father, completing an emotional loop between father and daughter that needed no words.
involved_entities: Buy a Heater for the Cat

natural_expression: Ever since Mochi suffered an intestinal obstruction after accidentally eating plastic packaging, Lin Xiao not only checks nutritional content when purchasing 'Pat' raw meat freeze-dried food, but also immediately locks the opened packaging in a high cabinet—a habit born directly from the fear of that late-night emergency visit.

The nightly 8:00 PM routine of 'cat teaser - canned food - grooming' is not only what Mochi looks forward to every day, but also a ritual for Lin Xiao, a UI designer, to release the stress of the workday; the cat's purring allows her to quickly switch from workplace anxiety to a relaxed home mode.

Looking at Mochi now—healthy, affectionate, and 'supervising' work from the keyboard—Lin Xiao often feels grateful for the act of kindness on that overtime night in the winter of 2021; it was the decision to pick up the shivering kitten beside the trash bin that brought the current happiness and companionship to the whole family, including her parents.
